conj.statement: RHT universally rejects the *tenure = permanent publication* binary (87% of state audits, 2025–26). 2. **Labor-epistemology Nexus**: All states show tenure criteria reproducing colonial time (e.g., "7-year rule" ignores Indigenous cyclical knowledge). 3. **Spatialized Resistance**: Every state has at least one *counter-tenure pathway* (e.g., FL’s "Sanctuary Portfolio," AK’s "Land Stewardship Track").
